Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Start_Your_Business.asp

# Ideation Route to SBDC

## Reusable BOSS response pattern
You are in the Ideation stage. The first step is to clarify the business concept and test whether customers want it before spending money on formation, branding, or equipment. For Houston/77084, the SBDC can help with business planning, market research, startup education, and local resource navigation. Next best action: confirm your business ZIP/county and request SBDC advising.

## Handoff fields to capture
- Stage
- Business idea/current business
- Location ZIP/county
- Primary decision
- What has been done
- Revenue/customer evidence
- Documents available
- Special eligibility or language preference
- Recommended resource and why
